title: Interpret The High-Level Sort Lifecycle And AGV State Progression
summary: Use this source-based reference to identify the current sort lifecycle phase and compare observed AGV and tote behavior against the training-described progression of startup, bulk sort, bag-out, and shutdown.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing or observing OptiSweep operation to determine whether the system appears to be in startup, bulk sort, bag-out, or shutdown, and to compare AGV behavior to the training-described lifecycle sequence.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a detailed operating procedure for issuing controls or changing system state.
Do not use this runbook to infer undocumented AGV state names, controls, corrective actions, thresholds, or transition logic.
Do not use this runbook as the sole source for fault recovery or troubleshooting steps.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Observe system operation and compare visible sort phase and AGV behavior to the training-described lifecycle.

safety_notes: This source provides a high-level lifecycle overview rather than a detailed operating procedure.
Do not infer undocumented state names, controls, or corrective actions from this overview-only source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to observe system operation or AGV behavior
Training source describing the sort lifecycle

access_required: Ability to observe the OptiSweep system or AGV behavior
Access to the training source or referenced lifecycle slide
system_preconditions: A sort lifecycle phase must be observable or under review

visual_references.description: Training slide summarizing the lifecycle of a sort and AGV progression through startup, bulk sort, bag-out, and shutdown.

steps.title: Identify the current sort phase
steps.purpose: Establish which lifecycle phase is currently being observed using the source-described sequence.
steps.instruction: Identify the current sort phase using the source-described lifecycle: startup, bulk of the sort, bag-out cycle, or shutdown.
steps.expected_result: The current observed condition is mapped to one of the documented lifecycle phases.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed system behavior aligns with one of the documented phases in the lifecycle overview.
steps.failure_condition: Observed behavior cannot be reasonably aligned to startup, bulk sort, bag-out, or shutdown based on the source overview.

actions.label: Determine lifecycle phase
actions.exact_action: Identify the current sort phase using the source-described lifecycle: startup, bulk of the sort, bag-out cycle, or shutdown.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide showing the lifecycle of a sort and the sequence of phases.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed system behavior does not align with the documented lifecycle sequence.

source_evidence.text: Identify the current sort phase using the source-described lifecycle: startup, bulk of the sort, bag-out cycle, or shutdown.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Lifecycle of a sort: startup, bulk sort, bag-out, and shutdown with AGVs cycling to chargers.
Slide about the lifecycle of a sort and how the system runs.

steps.title: Verify startup state progression
steps.purpose: Confirm that startup behavior matches the training-described AGV progression from shutdown at chargers to staged-for-sort.
steps.instruction: For startup, verify that AGVs are described as beginning in a shutdown state at specific charging locations and transitioning from a power cycling state to being staged for sort.
steps.expected_result: Startup is recognized as AGVs moving from shutdown at charging locations through power cycling to staged-for-sort.
steps.healthy_condition: AGV startup behavior matches the source description of shutdown-at-charger to power cycling to staged-for-sort progression.
steps.failure_condition: Observed startup behavior does not match the source-described progression or AGVs do not appear to be following the documented startup sequence.

actions.label: Check startup progression
actions.exact_action: Verify that AGVs are described as beginning in a shutdown state at specific charging locations and transitioning from a power cycling state to being staged for sort.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Lifecycle slide text describing AGVs starting in shutdown at charging locations and moving to staged-for-sort during startup.

stop_or_escalate_if: Startup behavior does not align with the documented progression.
The source overview is insufficient to determine a corrective action.

source_evidence.text: For startup, verify that AGVs are described as beginning in a shutdown state at specific charging locations and transitioning from a power cycling state to being staged for sort.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: AGVs start up in a shutdown state at specific charging locations; startup takes them from power cycling to staged for sort; shutdown cycles them back to the charger.
AGVs start in a shutdown state at specific charging locations, transition from a power cycling state to a staged-for-sort state.

steps.title: Verify bulk sort behavior
steps.purpose: Confirm that the main sorting phase matches the training description of item sorting and AGV tote movement to tippers.
steps.instruction: For the bulk of the sort, verify that items are being sorted and that AGVs take full totes to the tippers for bagging.
steps.expected_result: Bulk sort is recognized by active item sorting and AGVs moving full totes to tippers for bagging.
steps.healthy_condition: Items are being sorted and AGVs are taking full totes to tippers as described by the source.
steps.failure_condition: Observed bulk sort behavior does not include the expected tote movement to tippers or does not match the source overview.

actions.label: Check bulk sort activity
actions.exact_action: Verify that items are being sorted and that AGVs take full totes to the tippers for bagging.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Lifecycle slide description of bulk sort where AGVs take full totes to tippers for bagging.
Tipper workflow showing a full tote assigned to a tipper, queued, tipped, and bag-label handling.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed bulk sort behavior does not align with the documented lifecycle sequence.

source_evidence.text: For the bulk of the sort, verify that items are being sorted and that AGVs take full totes to the tippers for bagging.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Bulk sort is where items are sorted and AGVs take full totes to tippers for bagging.
Run the bulk of the sort where items are sorted and AGVs take full totes to tippers for bagging.
A full tote on an AGV is assigned a specific tipper, sent to the tipper entrance queue, moved to the tipper when available, and tipped for bagging.

steps.title: Verify bag-out behavior
steps.purpose: Confirm that bag-out matches the training description of cycling remaining tote contents to finish the sort.
steps.instruction: For bag-out, check whether locations that still have items in a tote are being cycled to finish out the sort.
steps.expected_result: Bag-out is recognized as cycling locations with remaining tote contents to complete the sort.
steps.healthy_condition: Locations with remaining items in totes are being cycled as part of finishing the sort.
steps.failure_condition: Observed bag-out behavior does not match the source description of finishing remaining tote contents.

actions.label: Check bag-out cycle
actions.exact_action: Check whether locations that still have items in a tote are being cycled to finish out the sort.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Lifecycle slide description of bag-out as cycling locations with remaining tote items to finish the sort.
Bag-out control description stating system bag out closes destinations and exchanges totes with parcels in them.

stop_or_escalate_if: Bag-out behavior does not align with the documented lifecycle sequence.

source_evidence.text: For bag-out, check whether locations that still have items in a tote are being cycled to finish out the sort.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Bag-out cycles locations with remaining tote items to finish the sort.
Perform bag-out cycles for locations with remaining items in totes.
System bag out will close all destinations and exchange all totes with parcels in them.

steps.title: Verify shutdown return to chargers
steps.purpose: Confirm that shutdown behavior matches the training description of AGVs cycling back to chargers for the next sort.
steps.instruction: For shutdown, verify that AGVs cycle back to the charger to prepare for the next sort.
steps.expected_result: Shutdown is recognized by AGVs returning to chargers in preparation for the next sort.
steps.healthy_condition: AGVs are cycling back to chargers as described by the source.
steps.failure_condition: Observed shutdown behavior does not match the source-described return-to-charger progression.

actions.label: Check shutdown charger return
actions.exact_action: Verify that AGVs cycle back to the charger to prepare for the next sort.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Lifecycle slide description of shutdown with AGVs cycling back to chargers.
Charger flow showing charger entrance queue, tote drop-off while charging, tote pickup after charging, and exit queue.

stop_or_escalate_if: Shutdown behavior does not align with the documented lifecycle sequence.

source_evidence.text: For shutdown, verify that AGVs cycle back to the charger to prepare for the next sort.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Return to shutdown with AGVs cycling back to chargers to prepare for the next sort.
Charger flow includes an entrance queue, tote drop-off while charging, tote pickup after charging, and an exit queue.

steps.title: Compare observed behavior to the documented lifecycle
steps.purpose: Determine whether the observed system progression matches the source-described lifecycle and identify mismatches for escalation.
steps.instruction: Compare the observed system behavior to the source-described lifecycle sequence and record any phase that does not match the documented progression.
steps.expected_result: Any mismatch between observed behavior and the documented lifecycle is identified and recorded.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed behavior follows the documented sequence of startup, bulk sort, bag-out, and shutdown.
steps.failure_condition: One or more observed phases do not match the documented progression.

actions.label: Compare lifecycle sequence
actions.exact_action: Compare the observed system behavior to the source-described lifecycle sequence and record any phase that does not match the documented progression.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Lifecycle sequence used as the comparison baseline.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed system behavior does not align with the documented lifecycle sequence.
A mismatch requires corrective action not provided by this overview-only source.

source_evidence.text: Compare the observed system behavior to the source-described lifecycle sequence and record any phase that does not match the documented progression.
Escalate if observed system behavior does not align with the documented lifecycle sequence.
Do not infer undocumented state names, controls, or corrective actions from this overview-only source.

success_criteria: The current sort lifecycle phase can be identified as startup, bulk sort, bag-out, or shutdown.
Observed AGV and tote behavior can be compared to the documented lifecycle sequence.
Any mismatch between observed behavior and the documented progression is recorded for escalation.
healthy_conditions: Observed behavior aligns with one of the documented lifecycle phases.
Startup matches AGVs progressing from shutdown at charging locations through power cycling to staged-for-sort.
Bulk sort matches active sorting with AGVs taking full totes to tippers for bagging.
Bag-out matches cycling locations with remaining tote contents to finish the sort.
Shutdown matches AGVs cycling back to chargers to prepare for the next sort.
failure_conditions: Observed system behavior does not align with the documented lifecycle sequence.
The current phase cannot be mapped to the source-described lifecycle.
Observed startup, bulk sort, bag-out, or shutdown behavior differs from the training overview.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if observed system behavior does not align with the documented lifecycle sequence.
Escalate when a mismatch requires controls, state interpretation, or corrective actions not provided by this overview-only source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary lifecycle overview slide for startup, bulk sort, bag-out, and shutdown.

missing_details: The source is a high-level training overview and does not provide detailed operator controls or exact system-state verification methods.
The source does not provide explicit corrective actions for lifecycle mismatches.
The source does not provide commands, thresholds, timing expectations, or formal escalation routing.
